sequenceDiagram(name = "UserLogin") {
    val user = lifeline(name = "User") { isActor = true }
    val loginInterface = lifeline(name = "Login Interface")
    val authService = lifeline(name = "Authentication Service")
    val userDb = lifeline(name = "User Database")

    message(from = user, to = loginInterface, label = "enterCredentials()")
    message(from = loginInterface, to = authService, label = "verify(credentials)")
    message(from = authService, to = userDb, label = "loadUser(username)")
    reply(from = userDb, to = authService, label = "userRecord")
    reply(from = authService, to = loginInterface, label = "accessToken")
    reply(from = loginInterface, to = user, label = "loginSuccessful")
}

@startuml
actor User
participant "Login Interface" as UI
participant "Authentication Service" as AuthService
participant "User Database" as DB

User -> UI : enterCredentials(username, password)
UI -> AuthService : verify(username, password)
AuthService -> DB : loadUser(username)
DB --> AuthService : userRecord
note over AuthService: Verify password hash
AuthService --> UI : accessToken
UI --> User : loginSuccessful()
@enduml

sequenceDiagram
  actor User
  participant Login Interface
  participant Authentication Service
  participant User Database
  User->>Login Interface: Enters credentials
  Login Interface->>Authentication Service: Verify(credentials)
  Authentication Service->>User Database: LoadUser(username)
  User Database-->>Authentication Service: User record with password hash
  Authentication Service-->>Login Interface: Access Token
  Login Interface-->>User: Login successful

edges: Bank Customer -> Banking App : Initiate Transfer (message)

sequenceDiagram(name = "Bank Transfer") {
    val customer = lifeline(name = "Bank Customer") { isActor = true }
    val app = lifeline(name = "Banking App")
    val transferService = lifeline(name = "Transfer Service")
    val accountDb = lifeline(name = "Account Database")
    message(from = customer, to = app, label = "Initiate Transfer")
    message(from = app, to = transferService, label = "Submit Transfer Request")
    message(from = transferService, to = accountDb, label = "Query Account Balance")
    reply(from = accountDb, to = transferService, label = "Current Balance")
    message(from = transferService, to = accountDb, label = "Post Transfer")
    reply(from = accountDb, to = transferService, label = "Booking Successful")
    reply(from = transferService, to = app, label = "Transaction Reference")
    message(from = app, to = customer, label = "Display Confirmation")
}

@startuml
actor "Bank Customer" as Customer
participant "Banking App" as App
participant "Transfer Service" as TransferSvc
participant "Account Database" as AccountDB

Customer -> App : Initiate Transfer
App -> TransferSvc : Submit Transfer Request
TransferSvc -> AccountDB : Query Account Balance
AccountDB --> TransferSvc : Current Balance
TransferSvc -> AccountDB : Post Transfer
AccountDB --> TransferSvc : Booking Confirmation
TransferSvc --> App : Transaction Reference
App --> Customer : Display Confirmation
@enduml

sequenceDiagram
    actor "Bank Customer" as C
    participant "Banking App" as App
    participant "Transfer Service" as TS
    participant "Account Database" as DB

    C->>App: Initiates Transfer
    App->>TS: submitRequest(transferDetails)
    TS->>DB: queryBalance(accountId)
    DB-->>TS: currentBalance
    TS->>DB: postTransfer(transferDetails)
    DB-->>TS: success
    TS-->>App: transactionReferenceNumber
    App-->>C: Display Confirmation

@startuml
actor Client
participant "API Gateway" as Gateway
participant "Rate Limiter" as Limiter
participant "Backend Service" as Backend

Client -> Gateway : Request Data
Gateway -> Limiter : Check Quota

alt Quota Available
    Limiter --> Gateway : OK
    Gateway -> Backend : Forward Request
    Backend --> Gateway : Data
    Gateway --> Client : Data
else Quota Exhausted
    Limiter --> Gateway : Quota Exhausted
    Gateway --> Client : 429 Too Many Requests
    loop 3 times
        Client -> Client : Wait Backoff Period
        Client -> Gateway : Retry Request
        Gateway -> Limiter : Check Quota
        alt Quota Available
            Limiter --> Gateway : OK
            Gateway -> Backend : Forward Request
            Backend --> Gateway : Data
            Gateway --> Client : Data
            break
        else Quota Still Exhausted
            Limiter --> Gateway : Quota Exhausted
            Gateway --> Client : 429 Too Many Requests
        end
    end
end
@enduml

sequenceDiagram
    actor Client
    participant API Gateway
    participant Rate Limiter
    participant Backend Service

    loop Up to 3 attempts
        Client->>API Gateway: Request data
        API Gateway->>Rate Limiter: Check quota
        alt Quota available
            Rate Limiter-->>API Gateway: OK
            API Gateway->>Backend Service: Forward request
            Backend Service-->>API Gateway: Data
            API Gateway-->>Client: Data
        else Quota exhausted
            Rate Limiter-->>API Gateway: Exhausted
            API Gateway-->>Client: 429 Too Many Requests
            note over Client: Wait backoff period before retry
        end
    end

create "Saga Orchestrator"

activate "Saga Orchestrator"
"Saga Orchestrator" -> "Event Log" : log(SagaStarted)

"Saga Orchestrator" -> "Warehouse Service" : reserveItems()
"Saga Orchestrator" -> "Event Log" : log(ReserveItems)
alt Goods Available
    "Warehouse Service" --> "Saga Orchestrator" : itemsReserved
    "Saga Orchestrator" -> "Event Log" : log(ItemsReserved)

    "Saga Orchestrator" -> "Payment Service" : executePayment()
    "Saga Orchestrator" -> "Event Log" : log(ExecutePayment)
    alt Payment Successful
        "Payment Service" --> "Saga Orchestrator" : paymentSuccessful
        "Saga Orchestrator" -> "Event Log" : log(PaymentSuccessful)

        "Saga Orchestrator" -> "Shipment Service" : commissionShipment()
        "Saga Orchestrator" -> "Event Log" : log(CommissionShipment)
        "Shipment Service" --> "Saga Orchestrator" : shipmentCommissioned
        "Saga Orchestrator" -> "Event Log" : log(ShipmentCommissioned)

        "Saga Orchestrator" -> "Event Log" : log(SagaCompleted)
        "Saga Orchestrator" --> "Order Service" : orderSuccessful

    else Payment Fails
        "Payment Service" --> "Saga Orchestrator" : paymentFailed
        "Saga Orchestrator" -> "Event Log" : log(PaymentFailed)

        "Saga Orchestrator" -> "Warehouse Service" : cancelReservation()
        "Saga Orchestrator" -> "Event Log" : log(CancelReservation)
        "Warehouse Service" --> "Saga Orchestrator" : reservationCancelled
        "Saga Orchestrator" -> "Event Log" : log(ReservationCancelled)

        "Saga Orchestrator" -> "Event Log" : log(SagaFailed)
        "Saga Orchestrator" --> "Order Service" : orderFailed(Payment)
    end

else Goods Not Available
    "Warehouse Service" --> "Saga Orchestrator" : notAvailable
    "Saga Orchestrator" -> "Event Log" : log(ItemsNotAvailable)
    "Saga Orchestrator" -> "Event Log" : log(SagaAborted)
    "Saga Orchestrator" --> "Order Service" : orderFailed(Inventory)
end

destroy "Saga Orchestrator"

"Order Service" --> Customer : orderStatus
deactivate "Order Service"

participant Camera

participant "Emergency Braking Assistant"

participant "Control Unit"
participant "Diagnostic Log"

Radar ->> "Fusion Unit" : measurement data

"Fusion Unit" -> "Emergency Braking Assistant" : reportCollisionRisk(timeToCollision)

alt timeToCollision < critical threshold
    "Emergency Braking Assistant" ->> Driver : acoustic warning
    "Emergency Braking Assistant" -> "Control Unit" : initiateBrakingManeuver()
    "Control Unit" --> "Emergency Braking Assistant" : ok
    loop until vehicle is stationary
        "Emergency Braking Assistant" -> "Control Unit" : adjustBrakePressure()
        "Control Unit" --> "Emergency Braking Assistant" : pressureSet
    end
    "Emergency Braking Assistant" -> "Control Unit" : endBrakingManeuver()
    "Control Unit" --> "Emergency Braking Assistant" : maneuverEnded
    "Emergency Braking Assistant" ->> "Diagnostic Log" : logEmergencyBrakingEvent()
else timeToCollision >= critical threshold
    "Emergency Braking Assistant" ->> Driver : distance warning
    "Emergency Braking Assistant" ->> "Diagnostic Log" : logObservedRisk()
end

"Emergency Braking Assistant" --> "Fusion Unit" : ack
@enduml

Emergency Braking Assistant -> Control Unit : endBraking() [vehicle stationary] (message)
Control Unit -> Emergency Braking Assistant : maneuverEnded (reply)
Emergency Braking Assistant -> Diagnostic Log : recordEvent("Emergency Stop") (message)

    message(from = eba, to = controlUnit, label = "adjustBrakePressure() [repeatedly]")
    reply(from = controlUnit, to = eba, label = "pressureSet")
    message(from = eba, to = controlUnit, label = "endBraking() [vehicle stationary]")
    reply(from = controlUnit, to = eba, label = "maneuverEnded")
    message(from = eba, to = diagnosticLog, label = "recordEvent(\"Emergency Stop\")")

    // Path 2: Time-to-collision is above critical threshold
    message(from = eba, to = driver, label = "[if timeToCollision >= threshold] showDistanceWarning()")
    message(from = eba, to = diagnosticLog, label = "recordEvent(\"Collision Risk Observed\")")
}

sequenceDiagram
    actor Driver
    participant Camera
    participant Radar
    participant Fusion Unit
    participant Emergency Braking Assistant
    participant Control Unit
    participant Diagnostic Log
    par
        Camera->>Fusion Unit: measurement data
        Fusion Unit-->>Camera:
    and
        Radar->>Fusion Unit: measurement data
        Fusion Unit-->>Radar:
    end
    note over Fusion Unit: Computes consolidated environment model
    Fusion Unit->>Emergency Braking Assistant: report(collision risk, time-to-collision)
    Emergency Braking Assistant-->>Fusion Unit:
    alt time-to-collision < threshold
        Emergency Braking Assistant->>Driver: Acoustic Warning
        Driver-->>Emergency Braking Assistant:
        Emergency Braking Assistant->>Control Unit: initiateBraking()
        Control Unit-->>Emergency Braking Assistant:
        loop Until vehicle is stationary
            Emergency Braking Assistant->>Control Unit: adjustBrakePressure()
            Control Unit-->>Emergency Braking Assistant:
        end
        Emergency Braking Assistant->>Control Unit: endBraking()
        Control Unit-->>Emergency Braking Assistant:
        Emergency Braking Assistant->>Diagnostic Log: recordEvent(EmergencyBraking)
        Diagnostic Log-->>Emergency Braking Assistant:
    else time-to-collision >= threshold
        Emergency Braking Assistant->>Driver: Distance Warning
        Driver-->>Emergency Braking Assistant:
        Emergency Braking Assistant->>Diagnostic Log: logRisk()
        Diagnostic Log-->>Emergency Braking Assistant:
    end

edges: Client -> Browser : Redirects to Auth Server (message)
User -> Browser : Enters and submits credentials (message)
AuthServer -> Browser : Redirects with Authorization Code (message)
Browser -> Client : Delivers auth code via callback (message)
finalCode:
@startuml
actor User
participant "Client Application" as Client
participant Browser
participant "Authorization Server" as AuthServer
participant "Session Store" as SessionStore
participant "Audit Log" as AuditLog
participant "Resource Server" as ResourceServer

User -> Client : Initiates login
Client -> Browser : Redirects to Auth Server
Browser -> AuthServer : Requests login page
AuthServer -> SessionStore : createSession()
SessionStore --> AuthServer : OK
AuthServer --> Browser : Login Form

User -> Browser : Enters and submits credentials
Browser -> AuthServer : POST credentials

alt Credentials are valid
    AuthServer -> AuthServer : Verifies credentials
    AuthServer -> AuditLog : noteCodeIssuance()
    AuthServer -> Browser : Redirects with Authorization Code
    Browser -> Client : Delivers auth code via callback
    Client -> AuthServer : exchangeCodeForToken(code)
    AuthServer --> Client : Access Token

    alt Scope includes profile
        Client -> ResourceServer : getUserData(token)
        ResourceServer -> AuthServer : reVerifyToken(token)
        AuthServer --> ResourceServer : tokenIsValid
        ResourceServer --> Client : User Data
    end

else Credentials are invalid
    AuthServer -> AuthServer : Verifies credentials
    AuthServer -> SessionStore : discardSession()
    SessionStore --> AuthServer : OK
    AuthServer --> Browser : Error Message
    Browser --> User : Displays error
end
@enduml

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model

sysml2Model(name = "WindTurbineModel") {
    // Abstract and specializations
    val rotorBlade = partDef(name = "Rotor Blade", isAbstract = true)
    val gfrpBlade = partDef(name = "GFRP Blade")
    val cfrpBlade = partDef(name = "CFRP Blade")

    // Leaf components
    val hub = partDef(name = "Hub")
    val gearbox = partDef(name = "Gearbox")
    val generator = partDef(name = "Generator")
    val nacelleHousing = partDef(name = "Nacelle Housing")
    val pitchControlSystem = partDef(name = "Pitch Control System")
    val yawControlSystem = partDef(name = "Yaw Control System")
    val cms = partDef(name = "Condition Monitoring System")
    val tower = partDef(name = "Tower")

    // Composite components
    val rotor = partDef(name = "Rotor") {
        part(name = "hub", typeId = hub.id)
        part(name = "blades", typeId = rotorBlade.id, multiplicity = "0..*")
    }
    val drivetrain = partDef(name = "Drivetrain") {
        part(name = "gearbox", typeId = gearbox.id)
        part(name = "generator", typeId = generator.id)
    }
    val nacelle = partDef(name = "Nacelle") {
        part(name = "rotor", typeId = rotor.id)
        part(name = "drivetrain", typeId = drivetrain.id)
        part(name = "housing", typeId = nacelleHousing.id)
        part(name = "pitchControl", typeId = pitchControlSystem.id)
        part(name = "yawControl", typeId = yawControlSystem.id)
        part(name = "cms", typeId = cms.id)
    }
    val windTurbine = partDef(name = "Wind Turbine") {
        part(name = "nacelleAssembly", typeId = nacelle.id)
        part(name = "tower", typeId = tower.id)
    }

    // Relationships
    generalization(specific = gfrpBlade, general = rotorBlade)
    generalization(specific = cfrpBlade, general = rotorBlade)

    bdd(name = "Wind Turbine BDD") {
        include(windTurbine)
        include(nacelle)
        include(tower)
        include(rotor)
        include(drivetrain)
        include(nacelleHousing)
        include(pitchControlSystem)
        include(yawControlSystem)
        include(cms)
        include(hub)
        include(rotorBlade)
        include(gfrpBlade)
        include(cfrpBlade)
        include(gearbox)
        include(generator)
    }
}

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model

sysml2Model(name = "RobotArmModel") {
    val base = partDef(name = "Base")
    val joint = partDef(name = "Joint")
    val endEffector = partDef(name = "End Effector")

    val revoluteJoint = partDef(name = "Revolute Joint")
    val prismaticJoint = partDef(name = "Prismatic Joint")

    val robotArm = partDef(name = "Robot Arm") {
        part(name = "base", typeId = base.id, lower = 1, upper = "1")
        part(name = "joint", typeId = joint.id, lower = 1, upper = "6")
        part(name = "endEffector", typeId = endEffector.id, lower = 1, upper = "1")
    }

    generalization(specificId = revoluteJoint.id, generalId = joint.id)
    generalization(specificId = prismaticJoint.id, generalId = joint.id)

    bdd(name = "Robot Arm BDD") {
        include(robotArm)
        include(base)
        include(joint)
        include(endEffector)
        include(revoluteJoint)
        include(prismaticJoint)
    }
}

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model

sysml2Model(name = "EarthObservationSatelliteSystem") {
    val payloadInstrument = partDef(name = "PayloadInstrument", isAbstract = true)
    val opticalCamera = partDef(name = "OpticalCamera") {
        generalization(supertypeId = payloadInstrument.id)
    }
    val sarRadar = partDef(name = "SARRadar") {
        generalization(supertypeId = payloadInstrument.id)
    }

    val primaryStructure = partDef(name = "PrimaryStructure")
    val solarPanels = partDef(name = "SolarPanels")
    val heatShield = partDef(name = "HeatShield")

    val batteryArray = partDef(name = "BatteryArray")
    val solarPowerRegulator = partDef(name = "SolarPowerRegulator")
    val pdu = partDef(name = "PowerDistributionUnit")

    val starSensor = partDef(name = "StarSensor")
    val reactionWheels = partDef(name = "ReactionWheels")
    val thrusters = partDef(name = "Thrusters")

    val onBoardComputer = partDef(name = "OnBoardComputer")
    val rfTransmitter = partDef(name = "RFTransmitter")
    val rfReceiver = partDef(name = "RFReceiver")

    val payloadSubsystem = partDef(name = "PayloadSubsystem") {
        part(name = "camera", typeId = opticalCamera.id)
        part(name = "radar", typeId = sarRadar.id)
    }
    val structureAndThermalControl = partDef(name = "StructureAndThermalControl") {
        part(name = "structure", typeId = primaryStructure.id)
        part(name = "panels", typeId = solarPanels.id)
        part(name = "shield", typeId = heatShield.id)
    }
    val electricalPowerSupply = partDef(name = "ElectricalPowerSupply") {
        part(name = "batteries", typeId = batteryArray.id)
        part(name = "regulator", typeId = solarPowerRegulator.id)
        part(name = "pdu", typeId = pdu.id)
    }
    val aocs = partDef(name = "AttitudeAndOrbitControlSystem") {
        part(name = "sensor", typeId = starSensor.id)
        part(name = "wheels", typeId = reactionWheels.id)
        part(name = "thrusters", typeId = thrusters.id)
    }
    val ttc = partDef(name = "TelemetryTrackingAndCommand") {
        part(name = "obc", typeId = onBoardComputer.id)
        part(name = "tx", typeId = rfTransmitter.id)
        part(name = "rx", typeId = rfReceiver.id)
    }

    val satellite = partDef(name = "EarthObservationSatellite") {
        part(name = "payload", typeId = payloadSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "structure", typeId = structureAndThermalControl.id)
        part(name = "eps", typeId = electricalPowerSupply.id)
        part(name = "aocs", typeId = aocs.id)
        part(name = "ttc", typeId = ttc.id)
    }

    bdd(name = "EarthObservationSatellite BDD") {
        include(satellite)
        include(payloadSubsystem)
        include(structureAndThermalControl)
        include(electricalPowerSupply)
        include(aocs)
        include(ttc)
        include(payloadInstrument)
        include(opticalCamera)
        include(sarRadar)
        include(primaryStructure)
        include(solarPanels)
        include(heatShield)
        include(batteryArray)
        include(solarPowerRegulator)
        include(pdu)
        include(starSensor)
        include(reactionWheels)
        include(thrusters)
        include(onBoardComputer)
        include(rfTransmitter)
        include(rfReceiver)
    }
}
